holdings.infoBox: ILCB is an equity ETF with a total of 539 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.40%, Apple at 6.57%, Microsoft at 4.47%, Amazon.com at 3.60%, and Alphabet at 3.22%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar U.S. Equity ETF (ILCB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Large-Mid Cap index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index consists of both growth and value stocks, selected from the top 90% of the US market-cap spectrum. ILCB was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
